description: You are an ADAS validation engineer configuring a Euro NCAP Pedestrian AEB (Autonomous Emergency Braking) simulation scenario. Configure the 'NCAP_TARGET' pedestrian with a speed of 1.5 m/s and a high-visibility orange shirt (Red=1, Green=0.5, Blue=0). Set the pedestrian's trajectory waypoints to [0 0 0] and [0 -6 0]. Enable recognition on the 'front_camera' of the 'EGO_VEHICLE' to output ground-truth bounding boxes. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/ncap_aeb_configured.wbt.
